title: autobench.heartbeat.timeout v1
description: Fired by the autobench heartbeat monitor when a thread has not emitted any events within the expected interval. Source is deer-flow's heartbeat monitor. Fields thread_id and subject are redundant (subject carries the thread name, thread_id carries the ULID).

thread_id.description: ULID or name of the thread that timed out.

timeout_at.description: Timeout threshold in seconds that was exceeded.

detected_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the timeout was detected.
